full_description: Keep the red block as the base and stack the green block on top of it.
schema: {A} denotes the red block, {B} denotes the green block, {a} denotes the arm on the red-block side, {b} denotes the arm that moves the green block
preference: num of words should not exceed 20. Degree of detail avg 8
seen: Keep {A} in place and stack {B} on top of it.
Use {b} to place {B} on top of {A}.
Make {A} the base and place {B} on it.
Leave {A} where it is, then put {B} on top.
Use {B} as the top block and {A} as the base.
Build a two-block stack with {A} below and {B} above.
Stack the green block on the red block.
Use {b} to lift {B} and set it on {A}.
Keep {A} fixed and complete the stack with {B}.
Place {B} above {A} to form a stack.
Set {B} on {A} and finish the two-block tower.
Make a stack with {A} at the bottom and {B} on top.
unseen: Keep {A} as the base, then stack {B} on it.
Place {B} on top of {A} without moving {A}.
Form a two-block stack with {A} below and {B} above.
Leave {A} where it is and stack {B} above it.
Complete the stack by placing {B} on {A}.
Make {A} the lower block and {B} the upper block.
Build the tower by setting {B} over {A}.
